properties.name: WEU 417 - Seale Fed 2 Proposed Production Line
Fopeano - Bay Fed - RR Bell Alt Gas SP
165HP Halliburton Booster (PROPOSED)
properties.desc: Halliburton HPS booster pump, 165 HP driver. ORIENTATION: N-S, ~7 ft east of TJ12000 east wall DIMENSIONS: ~18 ft L (N-S) x ~5 ft W (E-W) [assumed — verify with Halliburton datasheet] MOTOR: NORTH end SUCTION: east face (side), near NORTH/motor end — short run from Charge Pump DISCHARGE: SOUTH end (from end of pump body) — short run west to TJ12000 east-face suction Also needs: a new VFD (~165-200 HP rating) south of firewall east of VFD-650 hp, and PAC/PLC wiring to govern the new VFD in series

properties.name: NEW HP Hose - Charge Pump > 165HP Booster (suction)
properties.desc: Charge Pump discharge -> 165HP Booster east-face suction (near NORTH/motor end). Replaces the obsolete direct Charge Pump -> 12000 line.

properties.name: NEW HP Hose - 165HP Booster > TJ12000 (interstage)
properties.desc: Interstage: 165HP Booster discharge (SOUTH END of pump, from-end outlet) -> TJ12000 east-face suction (side entry, near south/motor end). HPS discharge is always from the end opposite the motor. ~7 ft run west to TJ12000. Include check valve + isolation per Summit HPS piping practice.
